title: INF-3 Steering vector store + persistence (vectors as governed artifacts)
goal: Persist registered steering vectors as governed artifacts via KERNEL-002 WriteBoxV1 + ArtifactStore: SteeringVector serializes to disk with provenance + license + creation metadata; reloadable across process restarts; reviewable in operator panel.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/techniques/steering_vector_store.rs persistence layer; integration with ArtifactStore; tests.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.c + AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES ("per-technique controls expose ... steering vector intensity + layer-index pickers"): steering vectors are durable governed artifacts. SteeringVectorArtifact: `{ id: SteeringVectorId, name, layer, hook_point, values_blob_path, intensity, provenance, license_tag, model_compat_tag, created_at_utc, created_by: OperatorId }`. values_blob written via ArtifactStore::put with content hash; metadata row written via KernelActionCatalogV1 action `kernel.steering.register` -> WriteBoxV1. Reload on process start: scan SteeringVectorArtifact rows for current process's models; rehydrate into SteeringHookOps registry. List/search via kernel.steering.list query action. Operator review surface: vectors marked `review_status=PENDING` until operator approves (review-gated writes per cluster A HBR-MAN feedback intent and feedback_no_default_md_files repository-quality principle). Tests: register vector, restart simulated process, vectors rehydrate; license_tag enforced; provenance preserved on round-trip.
risk_if_missed: Steering vectors are session-only; rebuilt every process restart; operator cannot review or audit them.
validator_focus: Round-trip preserves provenance + license; review-gated writes; mutations through KernelActionCatalogV1.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: License tag required at persist time.
Review-gated promote step before vector becomes active by default.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: SteeringVectorStore is well-shaped: persists SteeringVectorArtifact with provenance, license_tag, content-hashed values blob, and a KernelActionRequestV1 + WriteBoxV1 envelope per KERNEL-002 contract. License_tag is validated as non-empty (red_team #1 met). Mutations route through kernel.steering.register action (red_team #3 met). HOWEVER: red_team control #2 ('review-gated promote step before vector becomes active by default') is NOT enforced. ReviewStatus::Pending is written but no caller reads it before activation. Reload-on-restart functionality is not implemented — the contract requires 'scan SteeringVectorArtifact rows for current process's models; rehydrate into SteeringHookOps registry' but there is no reload helper or call site.

License_tag is validated as non-empty (red_team #1 met). Mutations route through kernel.steering.register action (red_team #3 met). HOWEVER: red_team control #2 ('review-gated promote step before vector becomes active by default') is NOT enforced. ReviewStatus::Pending is written but no caller reads it before activation. Reload-on-restart functionality is not implemented — the contract requires 'scan SteeringVectorArtifact rows for current process's models; rehydrate into SteeringHookOps registry' but there is no reload helper or call site.
